title: [MTR3]Tianjin Metro Pack
description: A resoucepack of Tianjin Metro for MTR mod
body:
# 简体中文
这是个用于Minecraft Transit Railway mod的天津地铁资源包。可在[MTRBBS](https://www.mtrbbs.top/thread-4525-1-1.html)查看更多详细内容。

这里只上传了两个较新的版本（也不算新了），因为MTRBBS的下载服务貌似寄了，较早之前上传的东西都损坏了。
# English
This is a resourcepack of Tianjin Metro for Minecraft Transit Railway mod.

You can check out the features at [MTRBBS](https://www.mtrbbs.top/thread-4525-1-1.html)(in Chinese only).

I uploaded two of the newer version of my packs to here becauce the download service of MTRBBS is not available for the files that uploaded too early at that BBS.
